content: -! New tab added: Release notes
-- View all historical updates in one place
-- Home page now shows the latest update
- Added links to the Discord server and Patreon
- Test
-! New feature: 'White flag next lap' indicator
-- The flag box displays an indicator when there's a chance that the white flag has been waved for the overall leader

-- Since iRacing only displays the white flag when you're approaching the Start/Finish line, having this indicator helps you decide if you need to come in for a splash and dash, or choosing when to make a pass if you're battling someone closely and need to know if you have 1 or 2 laps left
-- Note: this is functionally identical to the feature released in Command Spec recently.
- Added a pit limiter indicator
- Added a towing indicator
- Fixed bug where time left would occasionally disappear for a few seconds during qual sessions
- The slow car alert yellow flag now flashes until you are within 100m of the slow/stopped car. This is now consistent with the logic present in the slow car indicator in Drive Spec.
- Tweaked the visuals for the slow car alert so that the linear gauge is easier to see
- Added vehicle settings to the Relative page (see screenshot below). This replaces the pit service menu on that page.
- Fixed an issue which caused the pit service menu to not be clickable
- Fixed an issue which caused the Simhub controls (redraw pit lane/discard reference lap) to not be clickable
- Added a more prominent background for the player's line item on the time table, orbital tracker and driver roster. This helps identify your place on the table(s) a little more easily.
- Minor visual updates to the flag box
- Minor bug fixes
-! New feature: pit exit marker on leaderboard
-- When pit service items are active (refueling and/or tires), a green marker appears on the leaderboard indicating the position you'll likely be in if you pitted that lap (see screenshot below).
-- This marker also indicates approximate time lost by factoring time needed for refueling, changing tires, and driving in the pit lane with the limiter engaged.

-- As with the pit exit marker on the orbital tracker, this feature is available for the following cars/car classes: GT3, GT4, GTP, TCR, Dallara P217, Ligier P320, Global Mazda MX-5 Cup, Toyota GR86, Renault Clio, BMW M2 CS Racing
-- This marker is present on the leaderboard page as well as the orbital tracker page
-! New feature: 'White flag next lap' indicator
-- The flag box displays an indicator when there's a chance that the white flag has been waved for the overall leader (see screenshot below).

-- Since iRacing only displays the white flag when you're approaching the Start/Finish line, having this indicator helps you decide if you need to come in for a splash and dash, or choosing when to make a pass if you're battling someone closely and need to know if you have 1 or 2 laps left.
- The flag box now displays the session time left (when applicable) when no flags are active - this is now consistent with the Flag Box dashboard
- The blue new best lap indicator on the leaderboard and orbital tracker pages is no longer displayed if the driver isn't connected to the session
- The overall leader is now permanently exposed on the orbital tracker similar to the class leader - this makes it easier to find them on the map at a quick glance.
- Minor bug fixes
- Release notes not found
